name: gemineye
description: A sandboxed second opinion from a Gemini-family model via the Antigravity CLI (agy) — review-only. Eight subcommands: review, megareview, wip, sanity, name, compare, save, harvest. The reviewer is read-trusted to the project root and write-sandboxed; it proposes edits as code blocks, Claude applies them. v0.5.0 migrates the backend from the deprecated gemini CLI (sunset 2026-06-18) to agy via a dual-CLI adapter (prefer agy, temporary gemini fallback). Pairs with adjudant for vault context.
